ministry_department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
short_description: Pension scheme for small and marginal farmers providing ₹3,000 monthly pension after 60 years of age.
detailed_description: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Maandhan Yojana (PM-KMY) is a voluntary and contributory pension scheme for small and marginal farmers. Under this scheme, farmers between 18 to 40 years of age can enroll and contribute monthly amounts ranging from ₹55 to ₹200 based on their entry age. Upon reaching 60 years, they receive a fixed pension of ₹3,000 per month. In case of death of the beneficiary, the spouse is entitled to receive 50% of the pension as family pension.
key_benefits: Guaranteed monthly pension of ₹3,000 after 60 years
Low monthly contribution (₹55 to ₹200 based on entry age)
Family pension of ₹1,500 per month to spouse
Voluntary exit with interest on contribution
occupation_criteria: Small and Marginal Farmers (up to 2 hectares land)
other_conditions: Must be a small or marginal farmer with cultivable land up to 2 hectares
Should not be covered under National Pension Scheme (NPS), ESIC, or EPFO
Should not be an income tax payer
Must have savings bank account and Aadhaar card
Monthly contribution required till 60 years of age

REQUIRED_DOCUMENTS.description: Proof of being small/marginal farmer (land up to 2 hectares)
For pension transfer and contribution deduction
Bank IFSC code for account verification

application_steps_online: Visit the official PM-KMY portal at maandhan.in
Enter Aadhaar number and mobile number
Fill personal details, bank account, and land details
Select contribution amount based on age
Submit application and save enrollment number
application_steps_offline: Carry Aadhaar card, bank passbook, and land records
CSC operator will help fill the enrollment form
Receive enrollment slip with PM-KMY number

submission_locations.address: Local CSC outlets across all villages
submission_locations.notes: CSC will charge nominal service fee for enrollment

validity: Till 60 years of age, then lifetime pension
processing_time: Immediate enrollment, pension starts at 60 years

faq.question: What is the monthly contribution amount?
faq.answer: Contribution ranges from ₹55 to ₹200 per month depending on your age at enrollment. Younger farmers pay less.

faq.question: Can I exit the scheme before 60 years?
faq.answer: Yes, voluntary exit is allowed. You will receive your contribution with interest as per scheme rules.

faq.question: What happens if I miss monthly contributions?
faq.answer: You can regularize by paying pending contributions with interest. Continuous default may lead to account closure.

common_rejection_reasons: Already covered under NPS, ESIC, or EPFO
Aadhaar not linked to bank account
tips_for_successful_application: Enroll at younger age for lower monthly contribution
Ensure sufficient balance for auto-debit of monthly contribution
Link Aadhaar with bank account before enrollment
Keep land records updated and accurate
Save enrollment number for future reference
target_beneficiaries: Farmers with land up to 2 hectares
